summary: Fixed the logout refresh token security bug. The key change was reordering the frontend logout() to call authApi.logout() BEFORE clearing api.setToken(null), ensuring the backend receives a valid Authorization header to revoke refresh tokens. Backend changes (hash_token, DB storage, revocation checks, token rotation) and tests were already in place from a prior session.
decisions_made: Moved authApi.logout() call before api.setToken(null) in frontend logout() to fix the review gap where the backend POST would be sent without an auth header
next_steps: Run SQLX_OFFLINE=true cargo test to verify backend compilation and unit tests pass
Run npx next build to verify frontend compilation
